title: Minimal Dark Mocha
description: A dark minimal UI using Catppuccin Mocha meant to be familiar and unobtrusive
body:
A simple dark UI using Catppuccin Mocha's colors. It tries to melt away, stay mostly vanilla-like, and not be anything special.

## Features

- Smooth buttons. Keeps the depth while looking more sleek.
- Icons on buttons are changed to be more harmonus with text.
- The in-game HUD is unintenionally unchanged.
- Also supports EMI
